summary: Comprehensive testing of EzParts v2.0 completed successfully. All requested features from the review request are working perfectly. Backend APIs show 100% success rate, all critical frontend functionality verified including new tagline, My Garage management, price comparison with BEST DEAL badges, OEM/Aftermarket filters, AI Chat integration, and supplier trust scores.
passed_tests: Home page loads with correct tagline 'Find Parts. Fix Problems.'
My Garage - Add vehicle functionality works perfectly
My Garage - Vehicle selection and active status works
My Garage - Vehicle compatibility filtering when finding parts
Parts page displays star ratings for all parts
Parts page shows installation difficulty badges with wrench icons
Part detail modal opens and displays comprehensive information
Price comparison section shows multiple suppliers with pricing
BEST DEAL badge appears on lowest price option
OEM filter shows only OEM parts (3 parts)
Aftermarket filter shows only Aftermarket parts (7 parts)
AI Chat FAB button opens chat panel without issues
AI Chat responds intelligently to automotive questions
AI Chat integrates vehicle context for personalized responses
Favorites functionality - can save and unsave parts
Favorites page displays saved parts correctly
Suppliers page shows 5 US suppliers with trust scores
Cross-reference data (OEM numbers, aftermarket alternatives) displayed
Vehicle compatibility indicators work correctly
All navigation between pages functions smoothly
Backend API: All 11 endpoints working (100% success rate)
Backend API: Parts search and filtering operational
Backend API: AI Chat with GPT-4o-mini integration successful
Backend API: Favorites CRUD operations fixed and working
Backend API: Price comparison across suppliers functional
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (11/11 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (25/25 major features working perfectly)
